data.title: Bags.fm Wins “Crowdfunding Innovation Award” in 2026 FinTech Breakthrough Awards
data.description: In Los Angeles, Bags.fm, a rapidly expanding global crypto-native launchpad for developers and creators, was declared the recipient of the "Crowdfunding Innovation Award" in the 10th edition of the FinTech Breakthrough Awards. This prestigious program acknowledges firms and technologies that are spearheading innovation in the worldwide financial technology sector. Bags.fm runs a token-powered launchpad that focuses on continual, internet-native engagement rather than singular activities.

data.title: New England State Chapters Unite to Advance Financial Education and Advisory Leadership
data.description: Boston, March 20, 2026 - The National Financial Educators Council® (NFEC) is pleased to announce the expansion of its network with state chapters in the New England region. These chapters now cover Connecticut, Maine, Massachusetts, New Hampshire, and Vermont. This growth demonstrates the NFEC's commitment to financial education, with a combined reach of over 500,000 individuals across these states. Through these state chapters, the NFEC aims to equip people with essential financial skills, promoting financial literacy and better financial decision-making.

data.title: International Paper Plans to Build New Sustainable Packaging Facility in Rankin County, Mississippi
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Memphis, Tennessee, International Paper (NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC) revealed intentions to build a new sustainable packaging site spanning 468,000 square feet in Rankin County, Mississippi. This move underscores the firm's dedication to targeted expansion efforts and signifies a significant investment in the region.

data.title: CBRE Group, Inc. Announces Details of Conference Call and Webcast for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: CBRE Group, Inc. (NYSE: CBRE) is set to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at around 6:55 a.m. ET. Following this, a conference call will be hosted by management at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. The event, including a live webcast and supplementary slide presentation, will be available through the Investor Relations segment of CBRE's website at www.cbre.com.

data.title: Los Angeles Study Shows Families Can Cut Water Use While Making Everyday Life Easier
data.description: In Los Angeles, a pilot program by 50LH demonstrates how innovative products, appliances, and fixtures can simplify daily life and help individuals save time, money, and water.
